chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-1412 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of case(Priority) 1.For orders on withdrawal statement dated 06.11.2025. 2.For order son CMA 7593/24 3.For hearing of CMA 5654/24 4.For hearing of main case 19-11-2025 Mr. Badaruddin Memon, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Additional Advocate General-Sindh. **** 2. Since the order dated 15.10.2024, in respect of which the present application under Section 152 CPC has been filed by learned AAG for setting aside, recalling, or modification, has already been set aside by the Hon’ble Supreme Court, therefore this application has become infructuous and is disposed of accordingly. 1, 3 & 4. Earlier, this petition was decided by this Court vide order dated 15.10.2024; however, on challenging the said order, the Hon’ble Supreme Court remanded the matter to be decided afresh. Therefore, this petition was pending, and today, counsel for the petitioner, under instructions, does not press instant petition, which is accordingly disposed of as not pressed, along with the listed application(s). JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
